compunction.def: 內疚、良心不安的人物 (單數)
compunction.ex: He stole the money without any compunction.

computable.def: 可計算的人的人物 (單數)
computable.ex: The total value is not yet easily computable.

computation.ex: The complex computation took several hours.

computational.def: 計算的人、電腦的人的人物
computational.ex: He is an expert in advanced computational logic.

compute.def: 計算、估算、電腦化的人的人
compute.ex: We need to compute the total cost of project.

computer.def: 電腦、電子計算機人物 (單數)
computer.col: personal computer (PC), computer virus, computer science
computer.ex: He spent all day working on his new computer.

computerize.ex: They decided to computerize the entire system.

computing.def: 運算、電子計算機人物 (單數)
computing.ex: Cloud computing is essential for modern firms.

comrade.def: 同志、袍澤、同事人物 (單數)
comrade.ex: He met an old comrade from his army days.

comradeship.def: 情誼、同志情誼的人物 (單數)
comradeship.ex: There was a strong sense of comradeship in team.

con.def: 騙局、反對(論點)、精讀的人的人人物 (單數)
con.col: pros and cons (利弊), con man (騙子), con trick
con.ex: We must consider all the pros and cons tonight.

concatenate.def: 連鎖、串聯、連接的人的人
concatenate.ex: Use a local function to concatenate the strings.

concatenation.ex: A strange concatenation of events led to this.

concave.def: 凹的、凹的人的人物 (單數)
concave.ex: The mirror has a smooth and concave surface.

conceal.def: 隱蔽、隱瞞、掩蓋的人的人
conceal.ex: She tried to conceal her surprise and joy.

concealed.def: 隱蔽了的、隱藏的人的人 (或物)
concealed.ex: He was caught carrying a large concealed weapon.

concealment.ex: The bird found a quick place of concealment.

concede.def: 讓步、認輸、承認的人的人
concede.ex: The candidate refused to concede defeat today.

conceit.def: 自負、傲慢、巧思的人物 (單數)
conceit.ex: His speech was full of conceit and empty talk.

conceited.def: 傲慢的、自負的人人物 (傲)
conceited.ex: He is far too conceited about his new success.

conceivability.ex: We must consider the logical conceivability.

conceivable.ex: Every conceivable effort was made to save him.

conceivably.ex: It might conceivably happen in the near future.

conceive.def: 懷胎、構思、以為的人的人
conceive.col: conceive a child, conceive an idea
conceive.ex: It's difficult to conceive how he survived.

concentrate.def: 集中、濃縮、專心的人的人人物 (單數)
concentrate.ex: Please concentrate on your work and be quiet.

concentrated.def: 集中的、濃縮的人的人 (或物)
concentrated.ex: We need a more concentrated effort to win.

concentration.def: 集中、專心、濃縮物、集結人物 (單數)
concentration.ex: I began to lose my concentration in meeting.

concentric.def: 同心的、同軸的人的人物
concentric.ex: Drops of water made several concentric circles.

concept.def: 觀念、概念、想法的人物 (單數)
concept.ex: Justice is an abstract concept for humans.

conception.def: 觀念、懷孕、創始的人物 (單數)
conception.ex: He has a clear conception of what he wants.

conceptual.def: 觀念的人、概念的人的人物
conceptual.ex: The study uses a new conceptual framework.

conceptualize.def: 概念化、形成想法的人的人
conceptualize.ex: She helped to conceptualize the new project.

concern.def: 關心、擔心、關係、與...有關的人的人的人物 (單數)
concern.col: show concern, as far as I'm concerned, a going concern
concern.ex: The safety of the students is our main concern.

concerned.def: 關心的、擔心的、有關的人的人 (或物)
concerned.ex: Concerned parents met with local headmaster.

concerning.ex: I have some information concerning the theft.

concert.def: 音樂會、一致、和諧、協調的人的人的人物
concert.col: pop concert, rock concert, in concert with
concert.ex: They performed in concert with a local band.

concerted.def: 協商好了的、共同的人物 (單數)
concerted.ex: We need concerted action to solve the problem.

concertina.def: 六角手風琴、摺疊的人的人的人物 (單數)
concertina.ex: He played a traditional song on the concertina.

concerto.ex: The pianist performed a beautiful concerto today.

concession.def: 讓步、核准、特許權人物 (單數)
concession.ex: The government made a major tax concession.

conch.def: 海螺、貝殼、(解)耳廓的人物 (單數)
conch.ex: He found a giant conch shell on the local beach.

conciliate.def: 安撫、調和、懷柔的人的人
conciliate.ex: They tried to conciliate the angry local crowd.

conciliation.ex: The board of conciliation met early this morning.

conciliatory.def: 安撫的人、調和的人的人物
conciliatory.ex: She spoke in a very soft and conciliatory tone.

concise.ex: Please write a clear and concise daily report.
